jobs.title: Subscribe to YouTube Channel
jobs.description: Visit 'EasyTaskBD' on YouTube and subscribe. Stay subscribed for at least 30 days.
jobs.proofInstructions: Submit your YouTube channel name and a screenshot of the subscription.

jobs.title: Follow Protocol on Twitter (X)
jobs.description: Follow our official handle @EasyTaskBD for instant updates.

jobs.title: Alpha App Installation
jobs.description: Download and install the EasyTask Testnet app. Open for 30 seconds.
jobs.proofInstructions: Send device ID shown in settings.
